title: Sway
caption: Sway to this...
about: One of the first songs where I did the guest rapper verses.
lyrics:
[Instrumental 2 bars]

[Verse 1]
I’m not here for myself
I’m here for the crowd
I'm not here to forget
I’m here for everyone

[Chorus 1]
After day
Let’s sway

Until dawn
Let’s sway
Let’s sway

All the love
Let’s sway

For all of us
Let's sway the night away...

Sway the night away...

[Instrumental 4 bars]

[Verse 2]
I’m not here for myself
I’m here for the crowd
I'm not here to escape,
I’m here to feel found.

[Chorus 2]
After day
Let’s sway

Until dawn
Let’s sway
Let’s sway

All the love
Let’s sway

For all of us
Let’s sway the night away...

Sway the night away...

[Instrumental 4 bars]

[Guest male rub-a-dub]
Feel the sway, its in every heart,
Here for the crowd, set the day apart.
Let ya body rock, let ya spirit play,
There's no tomorrow — just sway today.
Let ya-self down, then bring ya-self up,
Drop to the bass, and rise to the love.
Feel the rhythm roll, let the tension fade,
Every move you make wha the music made.
Catch that vibe, let it fall over you...
Tonight we confess wha we always knew.
Love don’t hide when you sway with us —
If ya sway with tha crowd...
Then ya sway for tha love! (love...)
for tha love (love...)

[Instrumental 1 bar]

[Verse 3]
I’m not here for myself
I’m here for the crowd
I'm not here to just dance
I’m here to belong

After day
Let’s sway

Until dawn
Let’s sway
Let’s sway

All the love
Let’s sway

For all of us
Let’s sway the night away...

Sway the night away...

[Instrumental 2 bars]

[Outro]
Let’s sway

Sway…

Sway the night away...

Let’s sway

Sway…

Sway the night away...

[Instrumental 2 bars]
[Fade]
